{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Blackflame Trial
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The final [[Blackflame Trial]] features ninety-nine dark, humanoid figures in a field.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
